articles.title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
articles.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

articles.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
